notes: This is a code generator library (Lerna monorepo), not a web application with a UI. There is no dev server or browser-testable interface. The bugs involve code generation logic (nested conditionals in Vue, PropDefinition defaults, styled-jsx injection) that cannot be verified through visual browser testing with mano-cua. The deploy_commands in the task card (npm run dev) start a file watcher, not a web server.
